zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_1: $self$自然地向$target$身边靠了靠，肩膀微微下沉以迎合对方的手掌。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_2: $self$感受到肩膀上的温度，嘴角不自觉地上扬。"嗯？怎么突然这么粘人？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_3: $self$没有回头，只是反手轻轻覆在$target$的手背上拍了拍。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_4: $self$发出一声舒服的叹息，紧绷的肩部肌肉在$target$的触碰下瞬间放松下来。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_5: $self$侧过头，脸颊在$target$的手指上蹭了蹭，像只温顺的小动物。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_6: $self$笑着耸了耸肩，却没有躲开。"怎么，想给我按摩吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_1: $self$被触碰的瞬间明显僵了一下，随即困惑地看向$target$。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_2: $self$有些不知所措地停下了手中的动作，眼神游移不定。"呃……有什么事吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_3: $self$虽然没有躲开，但身体维持着一种尴尬的僵硬姿态。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_4: $self$睁大了眼睛盯着肩上的手，似乎在确认发生了什么。"那个……请问？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_5: $self$迟疑地张了张嘴，最终还是保持了沉默，只是视线不敢与$target$接触。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_6: $self$小心翼翼地缩了缩脖子，表现出一种试探性的顺从。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_1: $self$感受到肩膀上的重量，脸色瞬间变得苍白，身体止不住地轻颤。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_2: $self$紧紧咬着下唇，不敢反抗，只能低头盯着地面。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_3: $self$像个木偶一样任由$target$触碰，眼中满是惊恐的水雾。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_4: $self$全身紧绷，呼吸变得急促而浅短，仿佛随时会窒息。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_5: $self$强忍着想要尖叫的冲动，手指死死抓着衣角。"对、对不起……"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_6: $self$闭紧双眼，试图在脑海中屏蔽掉肩上传来的触感。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_D_1: $self$发出轻微的呓语，翻了个身背对着$target$，似乎在躲避骚扰。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_D_2: $self$皱了皱鼻子，迷迷糊糊地用手挥了一下，像是在赶苍蝇。"嗯……别闹……"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_D_3: $self$呼吸依旧平稳深长，对肩上的触碰完全没有察觉。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_D_4: $self$在睡梦中似乎感觉到了舒适，无意识地向着温暖的源头蹭了蹭。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_D_5: $self$睫毛微微颤动，嘴里含糊不清地嘟囔着什么，但并没有醒来。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_D_6: $self$身体本能地缩成一团，将被子拉高盖住了肩膀。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_E_1: $self$保持着上一秒的姿势一动不动，对手指在肩上的游走毫无反应。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_E_2: $self$像一尊精致的人偶，肩部肌肤在$target$的揉捏下凹陷变形，却无法回弹。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_E_3: $self$僵滞在空中的发丝随着$target$的动作轻微晃动，除此之外一片死寂。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_E_4: $self$毫无生气的瞳孔注视着虚空，身体任由$target$摆弄成任意形状。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_E_5: $self$皮肤上传来某种违和的触感，但神经信号无法传递到被冻结的大脑。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_E_6: $self$在静止的世界里，$self$的肩膀成了$target$手中唯一的‘活物’。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_F_1: $self$笑着抓住了$target$的手腕，将其轻轻拿开。"好啦，别闹，正忙着呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_F_2: $self$夸张地抖了一下肩膀，像是在躲避瘙痒。"哎呀，好痒！快停下！"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_F_3: $self$转过身，用手指戳了戳$target$的额头。"现在不是撒娇的时候哦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_F_4: $self$轻轻推了一下$target$，语气里带着笑意。"去去去，别在这儿碍手碍脚的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_F_5: $self$虽然没有生气，但还是侧身避开了接触。"身上全是汗，别碰我啦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_F_6: $self$无奈地叹了口气，把$target$的手从肩膀上摘了下来。"严肃点，还有正事要做呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_G_1: $self$礼貌地后退半步，拉开了社交距离。"不好意思，我不习惯别人碰我。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_G_2: $self$微笑着轻轻挡开了$target$的手。"请自重，$target$。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_G_3: $self$神色淡然地侧过身，巧妙地化解了这次接触。"有什么话请直接说就好。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_G_4: $self$用一种得体但坚决的眼神制止了$target$的动作。"我想我们还没熟到这种程度。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_G_5: $self$虽然还在笑，但身体明显地向后仰去。"哎呀，您这是做什么？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_G_6: $self$整理了一下肩上的衣服，不动声色地移开了位置。"请不要开这种玩笑。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_H_1: $self$猛地甩开$target$的手，眼神如刀般锋利。"别碰我！"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_H_2: $self$厌恶地拍打着刚才被触碰的地方，仿佛沾染了什么脏东西。"滚开，真恶心。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_H_3: $self$冷冷地瞪着$target$，语气降到了冰点。"把你的脏手拿开。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_H_4: $self$毫不客气地一把推开$target$。"谁允许你碰我的？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_H_5: $self$后退几步，做出了防御的姿态，脸上写满了警惕与愤怒。"你想干什么？！"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_H_6: $self$嘲弄地瞥了一眼$target$的手。"怎么？想性骚扰吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_I_1: $self$完全放松地靠在$target$怀里，眼睛半眯着。"手法不错嘛……再按一会儿？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_I_2: $self$发出慵懒的鼻音，身体软绵绵地任由$target$摆布。"嗯……那边也酸，再用力一点……"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_I_3: $self$转过头，眼神迷离地看着$target$。"你今天怎么这么体贴？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_I_4: $self$的手不自觉地攀上了$target$的手臂，似乎在寻求更多的接触。"这就累了吗？不要停……"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_I_5: $self$舒服地哼哼着，把脸埋进了$target$的臂弯里。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_I_6: $self$："感觉一天的疲劳都消失了……谢谢你，$target$。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_J_1: $self$原本僵硬的肩膀慢慢放松下来，神情变得有些复杂。"意外地……还不坏。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_J_2: $self$偷瞄了$target$一眼，脸颊泛起一丝不易察觉的红晕。"手法倒是挺专业的……"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_J_3: $self$不再抗拒，甚至微微调整姿势配合$target$的动作。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_J_4: $self$低声嘟囔了一句："看在你这么卖力的份上，这次就算了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_J_5: $self$原本紧抿的嘴唇松开了，发出了一声细微的叹息。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_J_6: $self$眼神中的警惕逐渐消退，取而代之的是一种困惑的安逸。
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_K_1: $self$稍微扭动了一下身体，似乎觉得这个姿势有些不舒服。"好了，有点疼了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_K_2: $self$轻轻拍了拍$target$的手背，示意停止。"即使是你，一直这样捏我也受不了啊。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_K_3: $self$皱了皱眉，肩膀不由自主地绷紧了。"这里好像越按越酸了……"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_K_4: $self$叹了口气，坐直了身体脱离接触。"够了够了，我的肩膀都要被你捏碎了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_K_5: $self$有些不耐烦地抖了抖肩膀。"你是想把我的皮搓下来吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_K_6: $self$推开$target$的手，揉着自己的肩膀抱怨道："你的手劲太大了，下次轻点。"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_L_1: $self$终于忍无可忍地站起身，椅子发出刺耳的摩擦声。"我说够了没有？！"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_L_2: $self$眼中的厌恶已经掩饰不住，身体极度紧绷。"你打算摸到什么时候？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_L_3: $self$咬牙切齿地低吼，声音里充满了压抑的怒火。"放手！现在！"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_L_4: $self$感觉受到了极大的冒犯，眼眶发红地瞪着前方。"这算什么？职场霸凌吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_L_5: $self$身体剧烈颤抖，仿佛再也无法承受这种精神折磨。"求你……别碰我了……"
zh-cn.com_touch_shoulders_L_6: $self$用尽全力甩动肩膀，试图摆脱那只令人作呕的手。

en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_1: $self$ naturally leans closer to $target$, dipping her shoulder slightly to meet their hand.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_2: $self$ feels the warmth on her shoulder, and the corners of her mouth twitch upward. "Hm? Why so clingy all of a sudden?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_3: $self$ doesn't turn around, simply reaching back to gently pat the back of $target$'s hand.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_4: $self$ lets out a comfortable sigh, her tense shoulder muscles relaxing instantly under $target$'s touch.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_5: $self$ tilts her head, rubbing her cheek against $target$'s fingers like a docile animal.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_A_6: $self$ shrugs with a smile, not pulling away. "What, you want to give me a massage?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_1: $self$ stiffens the moment she is touched, then looks at $target$ in confusion.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_2: $self$ stops what she's doing, looking flustered, her eyes darting around. "Uh... is there something you need?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_3: $self$ doesn't pull away, but her body maintains an awkward, rigid posture.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_4: $self$ stares wide-eyed at the hand on her shoulder, seemingly trying to process what's happening. "Um... excuse me?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_5: $self$ opens her mouth hesitantly but stays silent, avoiding eye contact with $target$.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_B_6: $self$ shrinks her neck back cautiously, showing a tentative sign of submission.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_1: $self$ feels the weight on her shoulder and goes pale, her body trembling uncontrollably.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_2: $self$ bites her lower lip hard, daring not to resist, staring at the floor.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_3: $self$ lets $target$ touch her like a puppet, her eyes filled with terrified tears.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_4: $self$ tenses up completely, her breathing becoming short and shallow, as if suffocating.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_5: $self$ clutches the hem of her clothes, suppressing the urge to scream. "I-I'm sorry..."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_Begin_C_6: $self$ shuts her eyes tight, trying to mentally block out the sensation on her shoulder.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_D_1: $self$ murmurs softly and turns her back to $target$, as if avoiding a nuisance.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_D_2: $self$ wrinkles her nose and waves her hand groggily, as if swatting a fly. "Mm... cut it out..."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_D_3: $self$'s breathing remains deep and steady, completely unaware of the touch on her shoulder.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_D_4: $self$ seems to find comfort in her sleep, unconsciously nuzzling towards the source of warmth.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_D_5: $self$'s eyelashes flutter slightly as she mumbles something incoherent, but she doesn't wake up.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_D_6: $self$ instinctively curls into a ball, pulling the blanket up to cover her shoulders.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_E_1: $self$ remains frozen in her previous pose, completely unresponsive to the fingers on her shoulder.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_E_2: $self$ is like an exquisite doll; the skin of her shoulder depresses under $target$'s touch but fails to rebound.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_E_3: $self$'s hair, frozen in mid-air, sways slightly with $target$'s movement, but otherwise, there is dead silence.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_E_4: $self$'s lifeless eyes stare into the void, her body allowing $target$ to pose it however they wish.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_E_5: $self$'s skin registers a strange sensation, but the neural signals cannot reach her frozen brain.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_E_6: $self$'s shoulder becomes the only 'living' thing in $target$'s hands within this still world.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_F_1: $self$ smiles and grabs $target$'s wrist, gently moving it away. "Alright, stop playing, I'm busy."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_F_2: $self$ shudders exaggeratedly, as if ticklish. "Ah, that tickles! Stop it!"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_F_3: $self$ turns around and pokes $target$'s forehead. "Now is not the time to be clingy."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_F_4: $self$ gives $target$ a light push, amusement in her tone. "Shoo, don't get in my way here."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_F_5: $self$ avoids the contact sideways, though not angrily. "I'm all sweaty, don't touch me."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_F_6: $self$ sighs helplessly, picking $target$'s hand off her shoulder. "Be serious, we have work to do."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_G_1: $self$ politely takes a half-step back, creating social distance. "Excuse me, I'm not used to being touched."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_G_2: $self$ smiles and gently blocks $target$'s hand. "Please behave yourself, $target$."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_G_3: $self$ turns sideways with a calm expression, deftly diffusing the contact. "If you have something to say, just say it."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_G_4: $self$ stops $target$'s movement with a polite but firm look. "I don't think we're close enough for that."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_G_5: $self$ leans back noticeably, despite her smile. "Oh my, what are you doing?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_G_6: $self$ adjusts the clothes on her shoulder, discreetly moving away. "Please don't joke like that."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_H_1: $self$ violently shakes off $target$'s hand, her eyes sharp as knives. "Don't touch me!"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_H_2: $self$ brushes off the spot where she was touched with disgust, as if contaminated. "Get lost, that's gross."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_H_3: $self$ glares coldly at $target$, her tone freezing. "Take your filthy hands off me."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_H_4: $self$ rudely pushes $target$ away. "Who gave you permission to touch me?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_H_5: $self$ steps back into a defensive stance, face full of wariness and anger. "What do you think you're doing?!"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_H_6: $self$ glances mockingly at $target$'s hand. "What? Trying to sexually harass me?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_I_1: $self$ relaxes completely into $target$'s arms, eyes half-closed. "Nice technique... keep going for a bit?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_I_2: $self$ makes a lazy nasal sound, her body going limp at $target$'s mercy. "Mm... it's sore there too, press harder..."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_I_3: $self$ turns her head, looking at $target$ with glassy eyes. "Why are you so considerate today?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_I_4: $self$'s hand unconsciously climbs up $target$'s arm, seeking more contact. "Tired already? Don't stop..."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_I_5: $self$ hums comfortably, burying her face in the crook of $target$'s arm.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_I_6: $self$: "I feel like the day's fatigue has vanished... Thank you, $target$."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_J_1: $self$'s stiff shoulders slowly relax, her expression complex. "Surprisingly... not bad."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_J_2: $self$ steals a glance at $target$, a faint blush on her cheeks. "Your technique is actually quite professional..."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_J_3: $self$ stops resisting, even adjusting her posture slightly to match $target$'s movements.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_J_4: $self$ mutters under her breath: "Since you're trying so hard, I'll let it slide this time."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_J_5: $self$ lets out a soft sigh as her tightly pursed lips relax.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_J_6: $self$'s wariness fades, replaced by a bewildered sense of comfort.
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_K_1: $self$ twists her body slightly, seeming uncomfortable. "Okay, that hurts a little."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_K_2: $self$ gently pats the back of $target$'s hand to signal a stop. "Even coming from you, I can't take this much pinching."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_K_3: $self$ frowns, her shoulders tensing up involuntarily. "It feels like it's getting more sore..."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_K_4: $self$ sighs and sits up straight to break contact. "Enough, you're going to crush my shoulders."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_K_5: $self$ shakes her shoulders impatiently. "Are you trying to rub my skin off?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_K_6: $self$ pushes $target$'s hand away, rubbing her shoulder and complaining: "You're too rough, be gentler next time."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_L_1: $self$ finally stands up, her chair scraping harshly. "I said that's enough!"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_L_2: $self$ can no longer hide the disgust in her eyes, her body extremely tense. "How long do you plan to touch me?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_L_3: $self$ growls through gritted teeth, voice suppressed with anger. "Let go! Now!"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_L_4: $self$ glares ahead with reddened eyes, feeling deeply offended. "What is this? Workplace bullying?"
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_L_5: $self$ trembles violently, unable to bear the mental torture any longer. "Please... stop touching me..."
en-us.com_touch_shoulders_L_6: $self$ shakes her shoulder with all her might, trying to get rid of that disgusting hand.
